courseThemes: hdd performance metrics (seek time, rotational latency, transfer rate)

lessonDigests.title: ce 323 -1
keyTopics: HDD performance metrics (seek time, rotational latency, transfer rate)
emphasisHighlights: Hard Disk Drives (HDDs) remain critically important, especially for data centers and AI, despite the rise of Solid State Drives (SSDs).
The physical structure of a hard disk drive directly impacts its performance, particularly concerning seek time.
Disk heads must not physically contact the platters; contact results in a 'head crash' which damages the disk.

lessonDigests.title: ce 323
emphasisHighlights: Hard disks are still relevant due to their use in data centers, especially with the growth of AI.
Transfer rate is an important parameter because the speed of reading bits by the head has to match the speed of the transfer rate.
Positional delay, or seek time, is the dominant factor affecting hard disk performance.
